top_signals.title: Investec Raises $43 Million in Debut Loss-Absorbing Debt Issue
top_signals.summary: Investec became the latest South African bank to issue loss-absorbing debt as local lenders work to comply with the new central bank framework.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
